# GitHub Copilot — m3xa-core conventions

Read [`BODY.md`](../BODY.md) first. It is the live infrastructure map (autogenerated). Then [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md), [`concepts/the_house.md`](../concepts/the_house.md), [`concepts/self_awareness_loop.md`](../concepts/self_awareness_loop.md), and [`LESSONS.md`](../LESSONS.md).

This repo is **public + anonymized**. Real source names (banks, analysts, podcasts) are forbidden. CI runs `tools/check_anonymization.py` and rejects any PR that leaks one. The translation key is [`docs/source_naming.md`](../docs/source_naming.md).

Vendor SDKs live in `m3xa_core/backends/` only. Other modules use the `LLMBackend`, `EmbeddingBackend`, `VectorDBBackend` protocols.

After structural changes, run `python tools/regenerate_body.py`. Pre-commit + CI enforce this.
